title: Thrash Metal Aggression
summary: 180 BPM thrash metal - palm-muted gallop riff, double-kick blast beats, shred lead.
prompt: A blistering thrash metal instrumental at 180 BPM. Palm-muted gallop riffing on down-tuned guitars, double-kick blast beats with china cymbal accents, growling distorted bass following the guitars, shredding solo with sweep-picked arpeggios. Classic bay-area thrash energy meets early death metal - relentless and heavy, raw analog amp tone.
